# Synthesis Proof 11: Low-Order Matrix Patterns

## Purpose

This report gives exact low-order data for the projection matrix:

```text
A[k,j] = 2 integral_0^1 psi_k(x) x^(2j) a^4 dx.
```

The data is exploratory, but all entries are exact rational values.

## Validated Computations

- exact 8x8 projection matrix generated: passed
- full rank 8 verified: passed
- principal determinants computed: passed
- sign matrix computed: passed

## Exact Matrix

Rows are `k=1..8`; columns are `j=0..7`.

```text
Matrix([[-512/5775, 512/225225, 512/225225, 512/425425, 512/799425, 512/1426425, 512/2414425, 512/3900225], [-512/35035, -512/315315, -512/5360355, 512/4849845, 512/4849845, 5632/70984095, 512/9100525, 512/12932325], [-512/135135, -512/626535, -3584/18706545, -512/14549535, 512/91265265, 512/35102025, 512/35102025, 6656/538919325], [-512/401115, -512/1344915, -512/4103715, -1536/37182145, -512/42902475, -512/386122275, 512/219559725, 512/153526725], [-1536/3002285, -11776/63047985, -512/6938295, -512/16900975, -5632/456326325, -512/111205575, -512/423361575, 512/1995847425], [-512/2204475, -14848/152108775, -512/11700675, -512/25072875, -8704/898198875, -6656/1465482375, -512/255877875, -512/700882875], [-512/4420255, -512/9471975, -15872/596734425, -512/37702175, -512/72212175, -9728/2609954325, -512/264777975, -512/534370095], [-1536/24701425, -20992/666938475, -18944/1137718575, -5632/618759225, -512/100586475, -512/177556995, -512/312838515, -8704/9489434955]])
```
